entry.title: Re: How can an independent consultant purchase a new 'redesigned' SAP Learning Hub subscription?
entry.content:
Hi @LisetteM
This looks like a new question. Would you mind to post this as a new question in our SAP Learning Q&A section 

This makes it easier  to follow-up:
That way other learners can benefit from the answer:
If you ask the question there other learners  can search for it in the future if they run into the same issue and there we have more features available for responses
Please also provide a sample of the issue that most of your learning journeys have a practice system but they lead you to the partner edition subscription.
Would you mind to repost it ?

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: SyntaxError: no closing braces found in '{' after pos:0 (at BindingParser-dbg.js:409:10)
entry.content:
Hello SAP UI5 Team,

I'm encountering a `SyntaxError` in my SAP UI5 application under the following conditions:

- When a user enters only an opening brace `{` in an input field and then clicks the save button.
- The error message is:
SyntaxError: no closing braces found in '{' after pos:0 (at BindingParser-dbg.js:409:10)
Below is a simplified version of my code:
javascript

 

 

const hbox = new sap.m.HBox({
    items: [
        new sap.m.Title({
            text: "{/title}"
        }).addStyleClass('BILP-KPI-title sapUxAPObjectPageSectionTitle'),
        new sap.m.Input({
            editable: true,
            placeholder: "{i18n>tileTabName}",  // Assuming you are using i18n model for localization
            value: "{/kpiTitle}"  // Assuming kpiTitle is a property in your model
        }),
]})

 

 



The issue occurs when the user inputs only an opening brace `{` in the input field and clicks the accept button, triggering the `SyntaxError`.

**What I’ve Tried**

- Entering both opening and closing braces `{}` does not cause the error.
- Checking for empty input fields to prevent the error doesn't help when only `{` is entered.

**Question**:
How can I handle this scenario to prevent the `SyntaxError` from occurring when a user enters only an opening brace `{`?

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: Re: Formatted Search for Bin Location Allocation
entry.content:
Hi,
I don't really understand what you want to gain in which step.
You can say in WhsDefinition, that SAP always should take the DfltWhs when receiving goods.

Isn't that what you are looking for?

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: SAP BO - What are the possible reasons for 'no data t...
entry.content:
The fact that you can refresh the report proves you have connectivity to the database used in the connection of the universe.

The answer here is the SQL being produced by the web intelligence query - it may contain incorrect joins or incorrect join types or may be imposing a restriction in the where clause that you are unaware of

James

entry.title: Re: Unassign from groups using IPS
entry.content: Did you find a solution to this? Looking for similar.

entry.title: Re: How to replace RRW3_GET_QUERY_VIEW_DATA
entry.content:
Hi Martin,

is there any chance that LBA will be down ported to DW4CORE200 = BW4/HANA 2.0?

thanks

entry.title: Re: -147 Get CurrentUserInfo failed on SAP connection using DI API
entry.content:
Hello @ANKIT_CHAUHAN  ,I tried the workaround fom the SAP Note 3476649 however the issue still persists on one SAP Client. On other SAP Clients the AddOn doesn't have the problem

SAP B1 Version: SP2402 HF1

SSO is not active and there are no active Identity Providers

Other steps were uninstalling DI API and re installing it and completly uninstall Client and other components and reinstall it.

Kind Regards

entry.title: App Title Issues in Central Launchpad with SAP Workzone Service
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

we have a Central Launchpad with SAP Workzone and provide CAP Cloud SAPUI5 apps as well as S4-Hana On-Premise SAPUI5 apps. After switching to Spaces and Pages in the On-Premise system, we noticed that some app titles cannot be loaded after exposing them to the Central Launchpad. On-Premise, the titles are displayed correctly without any issues.

Unfortunately, the issue is not entirely reproducible, as it occurs with only a few apps. Some SAPUI5 apps display their titles correctly, while others do not. For example, the app title is displayed correctly for a newly implemented Fiori Elements application.

We have created a technical catalog in our namespace and added the apps here. The Fiori Elements app, which works correctly, is also included. So, it cannot be due to the namespace. For exposure to the Cloud, we used a Business Catalog, which is also created in our namespace and references to the technical catalog.

To ensure that all caches (App-, Client-, Global-Cache) were cleared, I executed the following reports and transactions:

  • /UI5/APP_INDEX_CALCULATE
  • /UI2/INVALIDATE_CLIENT_CACHES
  • /UI2/INVALIDATE_GLOBAL_CACHES
  • /UI2/CDM3_EXP_CLEAN
  • /UI2/CDM3_EXP_SCOPE
  • /UI2/SYNC_PBC

Additionally, after clearing the caches each time, the Content Channel was updated in the Site Manager - Channel Manager. I also checked the Site Service from the Cloud for differences, but without success. (Service: "/cp.portal/portal/rest/v1/site")

Do you have any ideas why the title is not displayed correctly or what else I can check?

Thank you for your help,

Dominik Kastenmeier

entry.title: Re: Formatted Search for Bin Location Allocation
entry.content: In essence, once the GRN PO has been posed or saved as draft i want to populate the full location in the table next to the part code in stead of going into the Bin location allocation window for each line i hope this makes sence

entry.title: Re: SAP Commerce Cloud - Data Migration in Action
entry.content:
Thanks for good points @kai_unewisse !

Let me address your insights:

On Having stable system

This is why Staged approach comes in handy. Having the possibility to always switch back to that Migration Tenant with fully functional /hac and db read/write access (whether through Flexible search console or Migration console) will make the troubleshooting very easy.

On Snapshots

Good point, creating snapshot at milestones is always a good idea!

On Data encryption

Indeed for the project that I based my description on there there was an additional requirement to take care for data encryption which requires proper setup of the following, depending on what customer is using in source system (usually out-of-the-box key and pass):

 

symmetric.key.file.1=
symmetric.key.master.password=

 

On the Migration topic, there is neat description available in /hac

entry.title: Re: Analyse your data live with SAP Analytics Cloud on SAP BW on HANA & SAP BW/4HANA (Part 4) [Updat
entry.content: This is great content. Thank you @Adem_Baykal

entry.title: Re: Sap B1 Patch 2311 sluggish and slowing down system
entry.content: We have the same issue in 2308.

entry.title: Universal Parallel Accounting - Considerations for your S/4HANA Implementation
entry.content:
Over the course of my career as an SAP consultant, the topic of parallel valuations has come up frequently and always involves a lot of discussion. I’ve seen different ways of handling the requirements of managerial analytics versus those of statutory / financial reporting and keeping these two views of the business reconciled. When I learned about Universal Parallel Accounting, I was excited to present this new solution to customers and colleagues since it addresses some of the key challenges we faced in the past. There are several other good blog postings and training materials already available on the topic. This one is based on presentations I’ve done to introduce the topic in a short time to leaders at the customers I am involved with. It should help answer the key questions that most people have who have only heard about UPA in passing, and need to know what to do about it.

What led to the introduction of Universal Parallel Accounting?

Over the course of the development of SAP ERP solutions, separate parallel accounting concepts arose in different areas of accounting. Fixed Asset Accounting had Depreciation Areas, Overhead Accounting had different Versions, Material Ledger had different Currency Types, and the General Ledger had different Ledgers.

Because there were different ways to manage parallel valuations in the different modules, the overall solution was complex. The values did not flow consistently from one sub-ledger to the next, making it hard to understand and presenting challenges to do end-to-end analysis.  With UPA, all areas post into the Universal Journal (ACDOCA table), with a common ledger concept. Using the same ledger and currencies across all modules is easier to follow and understand.

Having a single ledger concept allows the values in one process to flow directly to the next, without the need for conversions or transformations. If we are recording different values in the primary costs, those should flow through to the secondary costs. Parallel depreciation values are inputs to parallel overhead cost valuations. These can then be used to calculate parallel activity prices, feeding into parallel valuations in Product Costing and Production Order settlement. This is depicted in the following diagram:

For further reading, refer to Janet Salmon's Blog on UPA.

What are the gaps that are solved by UPA?

Currencies were not translated consistently in different sub-ledger areas. With Universal Parallel Accounting, up to ten currencies can be calculated and posted in parallel.

Material Ledger currencies were limited to three types, leading to differences in the translation of values to additional currencies in ACDOCA. Cost Allocations and Settlements were not calculated separately in each currency. The calculation would be done in one currency, and the result would then be translated into the other currencies. This could result in different debit and credit values in a currency type that was translated. Now you can run the allocation per currency, so there are no longer any residual exchange differences. 

In Fixed Asset Accounting, you could not easily manage different Fiscal Year variants between Group and Local Statutory accounting. The new data structures in UPA are able to support this.

What changes in each of the sub-ledgers?

With UPA, Ledger and currency configuration is done once, centrally, and is removed from the configuration of the other areas. This has impacts on the data model (there are new tables), therefore, a conversion is required. Some programs are redesigned to work with the new data structures, such as Universal Allocations and Production Order Settlement.

Material Ledger, Product Costing

There is no currency profile to configure in the Material Ledger; the Ledger and Currency settings are inherited from the overall Ledger settings. Since you don't have to choose 3 Currency Types ('CTs') to use in Material Ledger, you no longer have to choose between supporting US GAAP or getting better management reporting. All Material Ledger postings are calculated and posted to all the currencies defined in each ledger. You can have CT10 & 30 in one ledger for Legal Valuation and CT11 and 31 in another ledger for Group Valuation. With this structure, you have consistent currency conversion across all valuations.

Standard and actual cost calculations are each done per ledger / valuation. There is a new material price table (FMLT_PRICE) that includes the price type and associates prices to ledgers. Any updates to prices are thereby done on a ledger basis. You will no longer see the additional tax and commercial prices on the Material Master; instead, there are valuation alternatives linked to ledgers. 

Production Order values are also posting per ledger with all the currencies defined for your ledgers. You can have different WIP, Overhead and Variances valuations that take into account the upstream and rules you have for legal vs. group valuations. 

Cost Center Accounting (Overhead Management)

Other areas in Controlling posted with only 2 currencies; with UPA, these, too, can post in up to 10 currencies. As a result, you will no longer have rounding and conversion differences for the additional currencies beyond the two. These sometimes resulted in residual amounts in additional currencies in allocations.  

Fixed Assets

Configuration settings are done per ledger or accounting principle. Each Depreciation Area is handled in all currencies, taking over the currency settings from the ledger. So this simplifies the currency configuration in this area. Each Depreciation Area has different valuation views. You can define specific depreciation keys and useful lives for asset classes in each.

What are some benefits this solution will bring to SAP customers?

As explained in the introduction, UPA provides better support of the requirements of international business flows by addressing key gaps. Once these gaps are filled, there is consistency in the data flows and value chains end to end. As a result, it is easier to understand how upstream processes impact areas downstream, making it easier for accountants and analysts to connect the dots and uncover insights. Simplified and consistent data structures lead to simpler calculations, unlocking automation opportunities. This drives operational efficiencies, accelerating some closing procedures. It also reduces the need for custom solutions, e.g. for inventory adjustments. Since many closing activities can be done per Ledger, it decouples the local closing process from the group close, i.e. you can start China’s close without waiting for other regions to finish.  The UPA data structures also provide a basis for better design in other areas. We will be able to build more transparency in logistics with the new sales and stock transfer processes with real-time elimination postings in the group valuation ledger. UPA will foster more innovations and new development as SAP S/4HANA solutions continue to evolve and expand. 

What are the considerations for customers when implementing a new SAP S/4HANA system?

Customers should be aware that new development in Finance will be based on the new data structures. Strategic solutions based on UPA have already been rolled out, such as Universal Allocation, Event-Based Revenue Recognition and Margin Analysis. If you want to be able to adopt current and future innovations, UPA will be a prerequisite. On the other hand, there are scope limitations today, listed in detail in SAP Note 3191636. You may have to decide between the benefits that UPA offers and the limitations in other areas until those are replaced with UPA-based functions.

It is important to consider whether you can activate UPA from the beginning because once you have postings in your system, a conversion program will be needed. How complex the conversion will be depends on the ledger and currency design of your current system. If you have a multiple valuation ledger, that will be a more complex migration to UPA than if you have only one single valuation ledger. For more information, see Universal Parallel Accounting Migration. 

If your organization has been working with SAP ERP solutions already, you must account for the functional changes for all solution areas that are no longer supported, such as classic assessment/distribution, classic WIP and variance calculation, Results Analysis and costing-based CO-PA. For each of these areas, the new UPA-based solutions will have to be adopted.

What to do next?

Whether you are planning an S/4HANA migration, in the middle of implementing, or already productive, you will have to consider whether and when to adopt UPA in your environment. There are many things that will influence this decision and many things will be impacted by it.  The questions you will need to answer include:

  • Which benefits will be relevant and important for you?
  • When can those benefits be realized? Especially for complex multinational organizations with longer rollout programs, it may be some time before there is enough of end-to-end business volume on the new solution to get the full benefit.
  • How will current business practices be impacted?
  • How costly will it be to adopt later as compared to sooner? With complex S/4HANA implementation roadmaps, interim solutions come with different costs. 

These are not easy questions to answer, but I hope you have understood why they matter and I’ve helped you start on the journey.

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Wien 04.07.2024
entry.content:
Ein gemütlicher Abend in lockerer Runde - zum zwanglosen Austausch über Themen rund um SAP und mehr...
Von der SAP Community, für die SAP Community

Alle Infos zum Event findest du hier SAP Stammtisch 04.07.2024

Tritt der Gruppe Wien bei und subscribe den Blog-Post SAP Stammtisch Wien, um über zukünftige Events informiert zu werden!

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch Wien 04.07.2024
entry.content:
Termin04.07.2024 18:30
Anmeldung -> SAP Stammtisch Event
OrtPointers
Resselgasse 5
1040 Wien
ThemaSIT und CodeJam

entry.title: Re: Multiple batches for finished good boxes in a single...
entry.content:
Hi Kailas,

yes, that is possible, e.g. when you post the goods receipt for a partial amount you can enter a new batch number.

But I am not aware of any way of automatically creating the batches upon release of the order.

Comment: I would not create multiple batches just to handle to box issue more easily. You should also think of the processes that depend on batches like inventory counting, stock determination and so on. All of the batches created for one production order usually have the same characteristics (like production date, component batches, SLED etc.) - so why create so many batches?

Best regards

Andreas

entry.title: Re: Charts and graphs in SAP AppGyver(and creating Fiori-like dashboard)
entry.content:
Hello @aoyang,
How to debug this application?

Why the debug option is not available in my case?

Also when I launch the app in my Android/IOS device getting blank chart (by commenting & uncommenting the code for the respective device). I tried all the solutions provided from you guys but not getting a result.
Please suggest any solution.

entry.title: Re: Why inbound delivery is not being distributed
entry.content:
Hi,

my first guess is that you have not configured a distribution model for your warehouse.

Check /SPE/OL19

Best regards

Andreas

entry.title: Re: Inbound delivery could not be distributed to wms
entry.content:
Hi,

my first guess is that you have not configured a distribution model for your warehouse...

Check /SPE/OL19

Best regards

Andreas

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Fully-Activated Appliance: Create your SAP S/4HANA system in a fraction of the usual
entry.content:
Thank you Jörg, for the very detailed blog. Unfortunately I have the problem in my trial environment that I receive the error message that the (standard) PW is not correct. So I'm not really able to test it yet. 

Correction. Problem was between Screen and Chair. Sorry.

entry.title: IPS transformation doesn't remove users from group when information changes
entry.content:
In IPS I've added to the target transformation to add users to a group based on a regex.

Users are not removed from the group if they no longer match the regex if the regex is updated.  How do I keep the groups updated?

SAP Cloud Identity Services Identity Provisioning 

This is the transformation that adds users to the group


{
"targetPath": "$.groups[0].value",
"condition": "($.emails[0].value =~ /^((?!@testemail.com).)*$/)",
"constant": "myGroupName"
}

entry.title: Does SAP MC DT allow for the migration of data from tables such as ZARIX and ADMI_FILES?
entry.content:
Currently, I am looking at the SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit—Direct Transfer that works upon the Greenfield approach. In order to migrate the data, it requires a company code and migration object that pulls the data from a business object and that will belong to a standard table to create a project, but in my case, I need to migrate the data from the table like below:  

  • ZARIX**:  Archive Infostructures 
  • ADMI_FILES: This table stores the metadata about the archive files, such as file name, path, and status. 
  • ADMI_RUN: This table contains information about the archive runs, including the start date and times of the archive sessions, the object being archived, and the user who performed the archiving. 
  • ADMI_EXAMP : Archiving  archive file info table 

So, I need help to know whether it's possible to migrate the data from the SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit—Direct Transfer approach. 

Thanks

entry.title: The CMS on machine 'DEV2' was stopped due to a critical error. (FWM 20031)
entry.content:
Hi Team,,

 

After install the crystal report server 2020 we tried to login lunch pad got error in the below.

 

The CMS on machine 'BDHQDWCCSGDEV2' was stopped due to a critical error. (FWM 20031)

 

Any solution pls

 

Thanks

Ramesh

entry.title: Re: Approve a document via Service Layer - SAP B1
entry.content:
Hi claudiocalabresi,

Use ApproverUserName and ApproverPassword for the same.

{
    "ApprovalRequestDecisions": [
        {
            "Status": "ardApproved",
            "ApproverUserName": "User1",
            "ApproverPassword": "User1Password",
            "Remarks": "Approved - OK"
        }
    ]
}

 

 

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Multiple SFC scan in SFC field in the POD
entry.content: Thank you @ManoelCosta

entry.title: Re: How to create a CDS File for Fiori Elements app in SA...
entry.content:
@TahirLeonenko 

On CDS views for Fiori elements applications, we don't use ObjectModel.foreignKey annotations. Just adding association to the view and exposing the association is sufficient.

entry.title: Creating QIP via QP02 runtime error encountered
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

I've encountered a runtime error when Creating QIP via QP02 while adding characteristic in IP. It happens on a standard FM QPSD_FEATURE_VERSION_READ - ITAB_DUPLICATE_KEY, do we have any existing sap notes regarding this?

Your help will be greatly appreciated!

Kind regards,

entry.title: Is there an API Endpoint to attach a file to a specific quote?
entry.content:
We are attempting to upload a file (pdf/jpg) from a public URL to CPQ. We are aware of the API {{url}}/Cart/UploadCartAttachment, but this attaches the document to the quote set in context.

Is there an API or method that allows us to attach a document/file to a quote with a specific quote ID? 

Additionally, could you suggest how to call "/Cart/UploadCartAttachment" using a Python scripting REST client?
We have been using `requests.post(url, file)` and passing a byte array, but it does not seem to work. 

Thank you,
Vaibhav Jadhav

1070 Wien

entry.title: Re: RAP FIORI ELEMENTS: Disable modal popup for create an...
entry.content:
@Natallia_Karpuk 

If the field in question is a key field implementing numbering logic will suppress the popup.

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/numbering

If it is a non-key but a mandatory field at the time of creation, suppressing the popup is not possible.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/rap-create-mandatory-fields-popup/qaq-p/13707714

entry.title: SAP IBP Analytic stories - Drill option in table and charts
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP IBP when we use the Manage Analytic stories to create a table or a chart I see the drill option grayed out in Tables and I do not see this option in Charts at all.

Can someone please explain the process to use the drill down option in Analytic stories in tables and charts like how we used to do in Advanced Analytics.

Warm Regards

entry.title: CDS Preview - Number of entries and rows retrieved does not match
entry.content:
Hi,

when using the data preview (F8) for an cds entity, many more rows are displayed than number of entries shows.

How can i fix this behavior?
best regards.

entry.title: Re: Get all orders for a specific SoldToParty via API (A2X)
entry.content:
Thanks a lot! That was quite easy with your great example :-), Don't know why but I use "=" instead of "eq"!

One more topic where you maybe can help. I checked the documentation without a getting a solution.

Is there a possibility to create the request above also with a time time interval of 3 month for CustomerPurchaseOrderDate? E.g. last three month or from Date 01.04.2024 to date 01.07.2024

entry.title: Re: SAP Builds Apps using BTP Destination - 500 Internal server error: Unable to fulfill proxy requ
entry.content: I'm struggling with this too. Wonder if you managed to resolve this. Any help will be appriciated 🐵

entry.title: Re: Jokes corner
entry.content: Apparently today (July 1st) is International Joke Day! Who knew! It's a very cold Monday here in Ireland, could do with a bit of light cheer today if anyone knows any good jokes?!

entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors and Contingent Workers
entry.content:
Hi

To link the the hire of a contingent worker and the end of their contract what are the best intelligent services events to link to? We use these to link to service now for new starters and teminations so I need to set up something similar for contingent workers?

Is it new work order and work order expiry?

 

Kind Regards

 

Liz

entry.title: Where can I learn how to configure core functionality SAP Asset Performance Management (APM)?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Managing SAP Asset Performance Management learning journey learning journey

Overview
This learning journey will guide you through the core features and functions of SAP Asset Performance Management (APM).

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, consultants will be able to understand and configure core functionality and integration aspects of SAP Asset Performance Management (APM) and learn how with SAP Asset Performance Management asset centric organizations can close the loop between equipment strategy, planning and execution by linking the entire process with a single digital thread.

Recommended (not mandatory)

  • Discover SAP S/4HANA Asset Management and SAP S/4HANA Service 


Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you.

We appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

entry.title: Re: SAP S4 HANA-EWM Quantity Classification in outbound process
entry.content: thx for your explanation.

entry.content: setDeferredGroups setChangeGroups

entry.title: Re: Connect to On premise system without Cloud Connector
entry.content: The error states that the connection timed out.

entry.title: No processor in submitted documents on Verify General Journal Entries
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I have a question regarding "Verify General Journal Entries" in Public Cloud. The problem is even workflow is created in "Manage Workflow"s app and the approval team is created in "Manage Teams and Responsibilities", when a document posted and has the status submitted, there seems no processor regarding the document.

  • User A - Requestor
  • User B - Processor

User A posts journal entry without error and document status shown as "Submitted" in Verify General Journal Entries app. 

And User A (requestor) has settings as following document refers:

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/workflow-to-verify-general-journal-entries-per-level-by-amount/ba-p/13549503

And User B assigned to as Processor in "Manage Teams and Responsibilities" app as shown below:

User B has copied role of SAP_BR_MANAGER role as "My Inbox" app requires to have.

Here is the current workflow settings also:

I have also found a note https://me.sap.com/notes/2922159/E

It's not quite the same problem with I have but when i check Work Items without Agents, i see these errors for the related document:

I could not be sure if it is related or further to do regarding this.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Get all orders for a specific SoldToParty via API (A2X)
entry.content:
I tend to use the eq, ne, lt etc. operators to differ better from the URL parameters that are set. 

You can use the datetime formatter to send a date value and the date range has to be calculated as two dates accordingly

https://<your-host>/sap/opu/odata/sap/API_SALES_ORDER_SRV/A_SalesOrder?$top=20&$filter=SoldToParty eq '229670' and CreationDate ge datetime'2024-01-31T01:00:00' and CreationDate le datetime'2024-02-03T00:00:00' &$inlinecount=allpages&$orderby=SalesOrder

entry.title: No Tax code in MIGO accounting document WE
entry.content:
Hello All,

Tax code is not transfered from PO to GR document (WE) . I checked field status groups OBC4/OB41 the customizing is ok. Is there any other customizing to do in order that the system pick the tax code from the PO to the Migo document ?

entry.title: Re: Create data using Journal Entry – Clearing (Asynchron...
entry.content: Thanks a lot for your support.

entry.title: Re: Building My SAP Career - Seeking Guidance
entry.content:
Thanks for writing @rochi !

@MyKelleTieman @sanilbhandari @ajaycwa1981 - maybe you can comment here? It looks like we have an aspiring FICO expert here looking for insights/opinions. 😊

entry.title: Re: How to seach in SAP Community?
entry.content:
Lack of possibility to sort results by SAP Managed Tags (or SAP products) makes Community useless in most cases, and idea of easy access to shared knowladge turns into looking for a needle in a haystack.
You can type product's name in searching result, like "C4C target group" instead of "target group", yet still it will be mixed with other solutions like "SAP Marketing" or "S/4HANA".
As mentioned, we may support our search by Google search engine instead of inbuilt one.

entry.title: Extended text on SAPScript does not display on the next page.
entry.content:
So I have 3 pages on my SAP Script. Initially it was just 2 pages.

Page 1 contains 2 columns. On column left, the standard text Z_TXT_001 is called. On column right, Z_TXT_002 is called. 

Page 2 contains 2 columns again. On column left, Z_TXT_003 was called. On column right, Z_TXT_004 was called.

The Z_TXT_002 text was too long for the column on page 1. The remaining text was called on the 2nd page and after that continuation, the Z_TXT_003 was displayed.

 

Now my problem is the Z_TXT_004 is also too long for Page 2 Column Right. However, its text does not continue on the third page column left. Why is that?

entry.title: Re: EC UI is displaying the Option ID from a picklist ins...
entry.content:
The Problem is in Picklist for Label Translation should be a text. If there is no Text for Example for EN, then they see just the OptionId. 
You see the right one, because in Proxy Language is not changed to user's Language and you see system in your preferred Language in Settings. 

Best Scenario is to change your language to user's language and proxy. You can use Google Translate to use the Transactions. 

So, Fix the translation in Picklist and they will see the correct Texts too.

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing - backflushing components
entry.content:
Hi,
Showing backflush postings in SFC Report is a known gap / roadmap item.
DM does not post any special message for backflush indeed, but you should find the goods issue posting for backflush items inside Process Order Quantity Confirmation message at to_ProcOrdConfMatlDocItm segment.

Br,
Manoel

entry.title: Re: What are the steps to follow S/4HANA CLOUD PUBLIC to...
entry.content:
@xabiel ,

Thanks, Does that mean do you want to create own ODATA API with Post Method ? If that's the case - i am afraid in Public cloud it is not possible to have you ODATA API with Post Method. However you can have a custom ODATA API via released CDS Views (with Read Method) - Not related to your case. 

In Public Cloud, we need to use the whitelisted artefacts provided by SAP like API's/CDS View and Business Objects. 

Did you get a chance to look at the SAP Business Accelerator Hub to see if there are API with Post method for your business case ?

Hope this helps, otherwise please let us know. Thanks

Best Regards,

Sri

entry.title: Re: material ***** in plant **** already has a marked sta...
entry.content:
Dear @mcelik1,

First of all, You need to delete marked cost estimate before create a new one.

1. Use CKR1 tcode and enter material & plant information. You can check if the cost estimate by selecting it and delete it.

2. Create a new cost estimate with CK11N. Enter material, plant and costing variant and create new cost estimate.

3. CK24 tcode could help you to mark the cost estimate. Then, release the cost estimate with CK40N tcode.

entry.title: Re: [Train-The-Trainers] SAP S4/Hana with GBI 4.1 EHS en Español - Inscripciones aquí
entry.content:
Hola Maite,

Hasta el jueves de esta semana. Y siendo un TTT (Train-The-Trainer) es exclusivo para profesores de SAP University Alliances. 

Para cualquier otra duda, estamos a disposición. 

Saludos,

María

entry.title: Shape the future of Simplified Implementation Experience in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
**Join Our Feedback Project: Shape the Future of Simplified Implementation Experience in SAP Cloud ALM! **

We are excited to announce the launch of our feedback project for the "Simplified Implementation Experience," a new application designed to revolutionize and simplify task management in SAP Cloud ALM. We invite you to be part of this initiative and help us create a tool that perfectly meets your needs.

About Simplified Implementation Experience

Simplified Implementation Experience aims to streamline task execution for project teams by incorporating intuitive features and a user-friendly interface. It seeks to simplify the complexities of project management, enabling seamless collaboration and efficient progress tracking across various phases.

Key Features:

  • Phase-Based Task Organization: Organize tasks according to different project phases, making it easier to manage and track progress.
  • Seamless Integration with External Applications: Connect with other tools and applications you use daily for a smooth workflow.
  • Real-Time Progress Monitoring: Keep track of your project's progress in real-time, ensuring you stay on top of every task.
  • Intuitive Task Navigation: Navigate through tasks effortlessly with a user-friendly interface designed for efficiency.
  • Focused Task Display: Focus on what matters most with a clear display of tasks, prioritizing what needs immediate attention.
  • Task Execution Status Setting: Easily set and update the status of task execution, providing clear visibility into your project's advancement.

Why Your Feedback Matters

We believe that the best products are built by listening to the people who use them. Your insights and experiences are invaluable to us. By participating in this feedback project, you'll have the opportunity to influence the development of Simplified Implementation Experience and ensure it meets your expectations and requirements.

How to Get Involved

Registering for our feedback project is simple. Follow these steps to get started:

  1. Sign Up: Click the link to sign up and register.
  2. Provide Feedback: Participate in the calls and express your thoughts, suggestions, and any improvement requests.
  3. Stay Engaged: Participate in regular feedback sessions and surveys to help us refine and improve the application.

Benefits of Participating

  • Early Access: Be among the first to experience and use the Simplified Implementation Experience.
  • Influence Development: Your feedback will directly impact the features and functionalities of the application.
  • Exclusive Updates: Receive regular updates on the progress and new features of the application.
  • Community Engagement: Connect with other users and share insights and best practices.

Sign Up Now, Registration needs to be completed by July 11th, 2024.

Help us create the ultimate tool that simplifies and enhances your capabilities. Register now to be part of the Simplified Implementation Experience feedback project and shape the future of project management.

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/3722

Together, let's create something amazing!

entry.title: How to disable object page table variant management/personalization in fiori elements + CAP odata v4
entry.content:

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/f26d42bea11c4deda82c7a2e00c9bc05

However it still saves the filters and applies them after I refresh the page:

Environment: CAP + odata v4 + fiori elements + SAPUI5 1.120

Thanks,

Zsolt

entry.title: Re: material ***** in plant **** already has a marked sta...

entry.title: Input validation in module pool
entry.content:
Hi all,

For a module pool program I have 'WERKS' and 'LGORT' as two inputs field.

I maintained WERKS, LGORT along with other fields in a custom table.

I used POV event on WERKS field.

Now when user select any of the WERKS from table the respective LGORT field from table should be selected and displayed on second input field 'LGORT'.

The field validation can be done using CHAIN ENDCHAIN. but my program contain different validation inside chain and end chain.

PROCESS AFTER INPUT.
  LOOP AT IT_ITEMS.
    CHAIN.
      FIELD IS_ITEMS-ITEM_NO.
      FIELD IS_ITEMS-MATNR.
      FIELD IS_ITEMS-MENGE.
      FIELD IS_ITEMS-MEINS.
      MODULE check_material.
      MODULE TC_ISSREQ_MODIFY ON CHAIN-REQUEST.
    ENDCHAIN.
    FIELD IS_ITEMS-XFELD
    MODULE TC_ISSREQ_MARK ON REQUEST.
  ENDLOOP.

How to validate WERKS(IS_REQ-WERKS) field and pass LGORT(IS_REQ-LGORT) to second field. please suggest..

CHAIN ENDCHAIN processing items fields from item table, but I need to validate header fields from header table, how to write code for this?

I am waiting eagerly to join Digital Skills Initiative

Thank You

Regards,

Sumit

entry.title: Re: SAP BO - What are the possible reasons for 'no data t...
entry.content:
It means that the query that WebI executed in the back-end database did not return any rows.  But that can happen for any number of reasons, including:

  • The conditions in the query simply don't match any records in the database.  
  • The query included a prompt, and the value entered for the prompt is not valid or does not exist in the database
  • The query contains an illogical combination of conditions (ex., "Region Equals 'East' And Region Equals 'West'"
  • Objects selected in the query (from results and/or conditions) result in tables being combined that weren't intended to be in the same query
  • Row-level security is in use, and the person executing the query does not have sufficient permissions
  • Passthrough authentication is used, and the person executing the query does not have sufficient permissions in the database
  • One or more tables in the database are empty

entry.title: Re: Change Default Setting for "GR Non-Valuated" Checkbox...
entry.content:
Hi MariusSiegel,

Thank You for your response.

In the Purchase Order, I have verified that Account assignment category A - Asset is used.

Is it possible to deactivate GR Nonvaluated checkbox for account assignment category A - Asset?

 

Regards,

Siva.

entry.title: Re: How to configure BTP services in Cloud ALM
entry.content:

The document explains how you can connect these services to Cloud ALM and the setup of the use cases of SAP Cloud ALM. The setup steps for the different products are described in the document provided. 

Best Regards, 
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: I have added custom object under multiprovider but it...
entry.content: I am using Eclipse IDE 2024-06.

entry.title: Re: I have added custom object under multiprovider but it...
entry.content:
It doesn't matter if you use Eclipse or the old Query Designer.

You just see the fields but never the part provider name itself. If you need to restrict based on a specific partprovider, set a filter on 0INFOPROV.

Please check the document Defining Queries

entry.title: Re: I have added custom object under multiprovider but it...
entry.content: those two infobject has been added.

entry.title: Re: Settings-> API missing from SAP Integration Suite

entry.title: Re: iContent Large WBT size compression
entry.content: many thanks MarcL, I will check it out!

entry.title: Re: Leveraging Generative AI Advancements for Linked Business Data
entry.content:
Hi Johannes, this is very interesting and very different from the approach we followed on our side for Self-supervised learning based on tabular data.

We studied 3 angles;

  • Possibility to apply Fine Tuning to an existing model based on Tabular Data
  • Possibility to use Attention Mechanism and Transformer Architecture based on tabular data (your study)
  • Possibility to apply In Context Learning to existing LLM

Although In Context Learning is faster to implement and cheaper since we dont update the model parameters, we heavily rely on the quality and relevance of the examples provided in the context, making it very sensitive to the order and the curated of the data we provide in context to the model, and the model we used.

Fine Tuning provided much better results, higher accuracy and control even though the datasets must be curated meticulously, as its often said, the quality of the data is what matters and we are Ok to limit ourseleves not to continously pre-train the models and live with past experiences.

we paused our architecture research when we realized that probably the best architecture was old Gradient Boosted Decision Trees (GBDTs), like XGBoost, because they were less computationally expensive and require less hyperparameter tuning compared to deep learning models.

So keep it coming! I will love seeing SAP progress on XTab and how it scores in TabZilla and similar benchmarks, or even better, with an SAP table specific benchmark.

entry.title: SAP GUI Issue: The SAP animated focus does sometimes not allign correctly.
entry.content:
Hello Everyone, 

we're curreently trying to pubish the SAP GUI 7.60 via Microsoft Remote Apps.
At the moment we're experience issues with SAPs integrated Red Box to focus the current dialog the User selected.In order to clarify the issue: 


As seen above, the red box does not fully allign with the GUI and so is the Userinput. 
So basicly you'll have to click the "missplaced" red box in order to write in the textfield.
This problem occurs since we publish SAP via the Microsoft Remote App function. This happens randomly and there is no clear reason or way to reproduce this atm. This also does not depand on a spefic transaction. 
Before we used Citrix Virtual Apps without any difficulties.

We're using Windows Server 2022 RDS Services in order to host and publish the Apps.
It seems like a scale/resolution issue but so far i was not able to find a solution or clues in order to get rid of this issue.

Does anyone have similar issues or ideas on how to prevent that from Happening?

Thank you very much and kind regards!

UI SAP GUI for Windows

entry.title: tranaction code /n/pbs/faglb03 - GL Account Balance display differences
entry.content:

User is using t.code /n/pbs/faglb03 - GL Account Balance display , I entered the GL Account,Company Code and fiscal year and executed. Balance is 39,000. When i click on the 10th period, the line item toal shows 28000. I even checked in all other t.codes, still showing differences. We are in ECC 6.0

How to resolve the differences? Please suggest.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Variable Pay Personal Goal Statement
entry.content:
Dear community,

I would like to know how we can download the Personal Goal Statements. I can only see the web preview directly in the worksheet. I am searching for a mass download or at least an idividual PDF download. Could you help?

Thanks and best regards

Julia

entry.title: Cleansing of iContent server, data report download, SF LMS
entry.content:
Hello, I have to free up some space on IContent, therefore need to check the size of each element stored there (to prioritize the most size-consuming elements). I know it's possible to do it manually, entering the folders one by one, but is there any easier way, e.g. to get the report that shows the size of folders/files per content object? 

In case there are some good practices related to content cleansing, i.e. criteria for cleansing, etc. - will appreciate all tips & tricks.

Thank you in advance,

Yuliia

entry.title: All idocs for a specific activity/service order
entry.content: Is there an easy way to find all idocs which have been created for a specific activity/service order?

entry.title: Using different Personal Goal Statement Templates
entry.content:
Dear community,

how can we use different Personal Goal Statement Templates for specific target group? For Rewards Statement there is the "Manage Statement Templates" tab to assign templates to groups but I don't see anything like that for Personal Goal Statements.

Thanks and best regards

Julia

entry.title: Re: How to translate forms in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Since Q3 2023 it is possible to import a workflow UI as a form to SAP Build Process Automation. A good tutorial can be found here.

But in this case the form must be created by a pro-code developer. Still, forms created directly in SAP Build Process Automation by means of low-code/no-code cannot be translated. Is there any plan to integrate a translation feature to forms created in SAP Build Process Automation?

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Re: How to get max date of intervention request
entry.content: Intervention is not a term used in SF Learning, is this within a different certain module of Sf HCM suite or just a label rename/customized?

entry.title: Data purge from SF Mobile app
entry.content:
Hello community.

The Mobile app documentation states that 

Data on the SAP SuccessFactors Mobile application and the Mobile server will be deleted when a user is deactivated. 

Does this apply also to device being removed for an active user from the registered devices list? Also - does it apply when a permission for mobile device usage is removed from the active user?

Thank you.

Please share your observations with us.

 

Regards,

Shubham Bulley

For this I am trying to implement the custom logic using BADI SD_BIL_DATA_TRANSFER.

 

below is my code.

 

 

 

 

Here I am getting error that 'Use of this CDS entity is not permitted' for  table zi_edi_upload.

 

Why i am getting this error and how to resolve it.

Can anybody help me here.?

entry.title: Re: Material Discontinue - Not Planned New Material
entry.content:
Hello

This is a system standard behavior, check the information provided in KBA 3083974 for more details:

'The discontinued part for subcontracting requirements is not supported in the standard system.
If a requirement laying after the effective-out date is not covered, it will have exception message 58 "Uncovered requirement outside of effective-out date" in the MRP list (MD05).
This requirement will not be covered by any new order proposals.'

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3083974

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: lyphtesttest create a alv
entry.content:
REPORT z_alv_example.

" 数据声明
DATA: gt_data TYPE TABLE OF spfli,
gs_data TYPE spfli.

" ALV相关声明
DATA: gt_fieldcat TYPE lvc_t_fcat,
gs_fieldcat TYPE lvc_s_fcat,
gt_layout TYPE lvc_s_layo,
gt_events TYPE slis_t_event,
gs_event TYPE slis_alv_event.

" 数据选择
SELECT * FROM spfli INTO TABLE gt_data.

" 准备字段目录
PERFORM prepare_fieldcat USING 'CARRID' '航空公司' 10.
PERFORM prepare_fieldcat USING 'CONNID' '航班连接编号' 10.
PERFORM prepare_fieldcat USING 'CITYFROM' '出发城市' 20.
PERFORM prepare_fieldcat USING 'CITYTO' '目的城市' 20.
PERFORM prepare_fieldcat USING 'AIRPFROM' '出发机场' 20.
PERFORM prepare_fieldcat USING 'AIRPTO' '目的机场' 20.

" 显示ALV
CALL FUNCTION 'REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY'
EXPORTING
i_structure_name = 'SPFLI'
it_fieldcat = gt_fieldcat
TABLES
t_outtab = gt_data
EXCEPTIONS
program_error = 1
OTHERS = 2.

IF sy-subrc <> 0.
WRITE: / 'Error in ALV display'.
ENDIF.

" 准备字段目录的子程序
FORM prepare_fieldcat USING p_fieldname p_coltext p_outputlen.
CLEAR gs_fieldcat.
gs_fieldcat-fieldname = p_fieldname.
gs_fieldcat-seltext_m = p_coltext.
gs_fieldcat-outputlen = p_outputlen.
APPEND gs_fieldcat TO gt_fieldcat.
ENDFORM.
